case_title: MARTIN GAEHWILER JR VS. GLORIA MARTINEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAEHWILER JR, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
